recommendations.title: Dreamworks: Holiday Classics
recommendations.overview: Join your favourite DreamWorks friends for these four holiday specials. Watch as those zany zoosters from Madagascar save Christmas, Donkey puts on a carolling Christmas Shrek-tacular, and Po prepares for his favourite holiday, the Winter Feast.
recommendations.director: Tim Johnson, Gary Trousdale, David Soren

recommendations.title: How to Train Your Dragon: Homecoming
recommendations.overview: It's been ten years since the dragons moved to the Hidden World, and even though Toothless doesn't live in New Berk anymore, Hiccup continues the holiday traditions he once shared with his best friend. But the Vikings of New Berk were beginning to fo

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda
recommendations.overview: Chosen by prophecy but doubted by all, Po is an unlikely Dragon Warrior—a clumsy panda thrust into the world of kung fu as a deadly enemy threatens the Valley of Peace. Under reluctant guidance by Master Shifu and the Furious Five, Po must embrace wh

recommendations.title: Sinbad: Legend of the Seven Seas
recommendations.overview: The sailor of legend is framed by the goddess Eris for the theft of the Book of Peace, and must travel to her realm at the end of the world to retrieve it and save the life of his childhood friend Prince Proteus.

recommendations.title: Over the Hedge
recommendations.overview: A scheming raccoon fools a mismatched family of forest creatures into helping him repay a debt of food, by invading the new suburban sprawl that popped up while they were hibernating – and learns a lesson about family himself.

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
recommendations.overview: Po is finally living the dream as the Dragon Warrior—until a dark presence from his past comes roaring back. When the ruthless peacock Lord Shen unleashes a devastating new weapon used to wipe out kung fu masters across the land, Po and the Furious F

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
recommendations.overview: While Po and his father are visiting a secret panda village, an evil spirit threatens all of China, forcing Po to form a ragtag army to fight back.

recommendations.title: How to Train Your Dragon
recommendations.overview: As the son of a Viking leader on the cusp of manhood, shy Hiccup Horrendous Haddock III faces a rite of passage: he must kill a dragon to prove his warrior mettle. But after downing a feared dragon, he realizes that he no longer wants to destroy it,

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda 4
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Action, Comedy, Adventure, Fantasy

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda: Secrets of the Scroll
recommendations.overview: As Po looks for his lost action figures, the story of how the panda inadvertently helped create the Furious Five is told.
